reasoning: This is an image classification workflow using a custom CNN in PyTorch on an ImageFolder dataset (seg_train/seg_test). Data is unzipped, normalized via computed mean/std, augmented, and split into train/val/test loaders; a CNN is defined and trained with checkpointing, early stopping, and per-epoch validation. After training, the best checkpoint is loaded and the model is evaluated on held-out test data with a confusion matrix, precision, recall, and a single-image prediction.
